title: VampiricBooks craft addon
description: A simple mod that adds a crafting recipe for vampire books from the Vampirism mod.
body:
This mod was created solely to make leveling in Vampirism 1.12.2 easier and more convenient. Feel free to use it in your own mod builds.
My mod adds two variants of crafting recipes for vampire books.

1. Option for playing as a vampire.

2. Option for playing as a vampire hunter.
